name: ShCh-202
events: 20 Aug 1943 ShCh-202 fires three torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant about 35 nautical miles west of Yevpatoriya, Crimea in position 45?16'N, 32?34'E. All torpedoes fired missed their target.

19 Oct 1943 ShCh-202 fires three torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant about 75 nautical miles south-west of Yevpatoriya, Crimea in position 44°43'N, 31°48'E. All three torpedoes missed their target.

28 Apr 1944 ShCh-202 fires four torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of about 6000 tons sailing in a convoy about 70 nautical miles east of Constanta, Romania in position 44°04N, 30°16'E. All torpedoes fired missed their target

7 May 1944 ShCh-202 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a landing barge in the Black Sea about 90 nautical miles east-south-east of Constanta, Romania in position 43°45N, 30°37'E. All torpedoes fired missed their target.

8 May 1944 At 1704 hours ShCh-202 fires two torpedoes against the German Elbe 5 in the Black Sea about 75 nautical miles east-south-east of Constanta, Romania in position 43°55'N, 30°17'E. All torpedoes fired missed their target.

At 1704 hours ShCh-202 fires a torpedo against the German Vistula in the Black Sea about 80 nautical miles east-south-east of Constanta, Romania in position 43°54'N, 30°17'E. The torpedo missed its target.
